# Anduril Industries, Sumisho Aero-Systems to demonstrate diverse command and control for the Japan Maritime Self Defense Force

Anduril and Sumisho Aero-Systems will demonstrate Lattice's AI-enabled platform to enhance JMSDF situational awareness and command and control capabilities.
